summary: MIMO speech-text multimodal models require interleaved [text+3audio_channel] input with group_size fillers and conversation markers ([|Human|]:/[|SpeechGPT|]:). zeroemb_idx = speech_vocab_size - 1.
CANN 8.1.RC1 is incompatible with NumPy 2.x due to removed numpy._core module. Pin numpy<2.0 (tested 1.26.4).
CANN TBE requires explicit installation of attrs, cloudpickle, ml-dtypes, and tornado before first NPU model compilation.
MIMOLlamaForCausalLM.from_pretrained() requires explicit padding_idx, sosp_idx, eosp_idx, and args kwargs.
